phases.title: Unified Init — Project Onboarding ⭐ **REWRITE (R3)**

tasks.title: Modify init.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/commands/init.ts. Add interactive profile wizard, absorb setup.ts workstation steps, add `--non-interactive` and `--agent` flags, add registry cloning and extension discovery

tasks.title: Modify setup.ts
tasks.description: DELETE src/commands/setup.ts. Absorbed into init

tasks.title: Modify setup-slack.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY src/commands/setup-slack.ts. Refactor to be callable from init flow, not standalone

tasks.title: Create extension-detector.ts
tasks.description: NEW src/engine/extension-detector.ts. Detect installed CLIs like obsidian-cli

doneWhen: `gwrk init` runs interactive profile wizard: detects project type, confirms with user, walks through stack/layout/architecture/conventions
`gwrk init` runs workstation provisioning (TCC, SSH, gh) — former `gwrk setup` behavior
`gwrk init` detects agent CLIs and configures agents block
`gwrk init` provisions Slack channel if tokens available
`gwrk init` clones `gwrk-plugins` registry to `~/.gwrk/registry/`
`gwrk init` detects installed extensions (e.g. obsidian-cli) and updates `.gwrkrc.json`
`gwrk init --non-interactive` uses pure auto-detection, writes `.gwrkrc.json` silently
`gwrk init --agent` outputs structured JSON, skips human-dependent steps (TCC, SSH, Slack), relaxes pre-requisites — designed for agent-driven bootstrapping of new repos
`gwrk setup` is removed from CLI surface
`pnpm build` compiles clean, `pnpm test` all passing
Schema backward compat: existing `.gwrkrc.json` files parse without error
